raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX I was charged {$680.00} for a charge at XXXX XXXX. 

This transaction wasn't made by me or anyone allowed to use this account. 

I contacted Citi bank several times over the past XXXX years to report this fraud and follow up on the progress, spending hours being bounced around to different departments. 

The case is still pending with the Security department and I havent received an update since XX/XX/XXXX.
